phrases.intent_en: Ask where to book guided tours
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo reservar visitas guiadas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh PWEH-doh reh-ser-BAHR VEE-see-tahs gee-AH-dahs?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de reservas, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-SEHR-bahs AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the reservations desk, at the back.

responses.english: At the reservations desk, at the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH reh-SEHR-bahs AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: En el mostrador de reservas, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Costa Brava maps are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen mapas de la Costa Brava?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿TYEH-nehn MAH-pahs deh lah KOH-stah BRAH-vah?

likely_response.local: Sí, están en el folletero central.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ EHSTÁN EHN EHL fohl-leh-TEH-roh thehnt-RAHL
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, they are in the central rack.

responses.english: Yes, they are in the central rack.
responses.phonetic: SÍ EHSTÁN EHN EHL fohl-leh-TEH-roh thehnt-RAHL
responses.french: Sí, están en el folletero central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Pyrenees information is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la información de los Pirineos?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs DÓN-deh EHSTÁ LAH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN DEH LOHS pee-ree-NEH-ohs

likely_response.local: Junto al mapa regional, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL MAH-pah reh-hee-oh-NAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the regional map, on the left.

responses.english: Next to the regional map, on the left.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL MAH-pah reh-hee-oh-NAHL AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: Junto al mapa regional, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to book accommodation help
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo solicito ayuda para reservar alojamiento?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KOH-moh so-lee-SEE-toh ah-YOO-dah pah-rah reh-ser-BAHR ah-loh-hah-MYEN-toh?

likely_response.local: Rellene este formulario y espere cinco minutos aproximadamente.
likely_response.pronunciation: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y eh-SPEH-reh THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs ahp-roh-ksee-mah-dah-MEHN-teh
likely_response.translation_en: Fill out this form and wait about five minutes.

responses.english: Fill out this form and wait about five minutes.
responses.phonetic: rehl-LEH-neh EH-steh fohr-moo-lah-REE-oh Y eh-SPEH-reh THEEN-koh mee-NOO-tohs ahp-roh-ksee-mah-dah-MEHN-teh
responses.french: Rellene este formulario y espere cinco minutos aproximadamente.
